descriptionHtml:
Fountaine Pajot Isla 40 for Sale 2024 Owner's version

If you are in the market for a dependable and versatile catamaran, look no further than the Fountain Pajot Isla 40 for sale 2024. Designed with the modern sailor in mind, this model combines comfort and performance, making it suitable for both cruising and exploring. This particular vessel is brand new and in excellent condition, making it a standout option for buyers seeking the latest in sailing technology and design.

Specifications:

  • Brand: Fountaine Pajot
  • Model: Isla 40
  • Year: 2024
  • Length: 11.93 m
  • Beam: 6.63 m
  • Draft: 1.21 m
  • Engine: Volvo D1-30
  • Cabins: 3
  • Berths: 6 + 2
  • Bathrooms: 3
  • Convertible Salon: Yes
  • Engines: 2 x Volvo D1-30
  • Power: 2 x 30 hp
  • Fuel Type: Diesel
  • Type of Propeller: Folding 3-blade

The Fountain Pajot Isla 40 is designed to provide a spacious and inviting atmosphere. With three well-appointed cabins, there’s ample space for family or friends, making it ideal for shared adventures on the water. The additional convertible salon offers versatility, allowing the space to adapt to your needs.

Equipped with a range of features that enhance the sailing experience, this catamaran includes:

  • Curtains in cabins
  • Mooring kit with six fenders
  • One electric winch for mainsail
  • Interior courtesy lighting
  • Pressurised seawater system
  • Fusion audio pack Bluetooth (4 speakers)
  • 2000W inverter/charger (220V 50Hz or 110V 60Hz)
  • Outdoor cushions for the cockpit and lounge deck
  • Additional electric freshwater pump
  • Cockpit courtesy lighting
  • Bimini for helm station
  • Protective enclosure for helm Bimini
  • Outdoor foredeck cushions
  • Synthetic teak flooring on transoms and cockpit
  • Additional mooring cleats
  • Saloon curtains
  • Saloon table convertible into berth
  • 12V 63L cold storage (at 5°C)
  • Gas oven
  • Multiple 12V fans (six)
  • Interior 12V outlets
  • Solar panels (3 x 90/100 W)
  • Automatic mainsail hook
  • Gear for Gennaker and bowsprit
  • Additional windlass control chain counter
  • Antifouling with primary epoxy
  • Secondary VHF AIS at helm station
  • GARMIN navigation system: Autopilot, VHF, AIS, and dual GPS (8412/8410)
  • Radar

The Isla 40 combines functionality with comfort, ensuring that you have everything you need at your fingertips. The sail drive system provides an efficient and smooth sailing experience, and the multiple power options ensure you remain well-equipped for longer journeys.

Now is a great time to consider the Fountain Pajot Isla 40 for sale 2024. With its new condition, thoughtful design, and robust equipment list, this catamaran is ready for your next adventure. Don’t miss the chance to own a quality vessel that meets modern sailing needs without compromising on comfort or performance. We are looking forward to hearing from you!
